steps.title: Synthesize three outcomes
steps.content: The notes report three different effects of bat ingestion on seed germination: positive for Ficus grevei, neutral for Senna fruticosa, and negative for Piper friedrichsthalii.

steps.title: Avoid cherry-picking
steps.content: B reverses the direction of the studies by making germination affect bats. C misstates the 2017 study as negative, and D claims a consistent positive effect even though the notes show neutral and negative findings too. The accurate generalization is that effects can vary. The answer is A.
